description: Reusable contract for n8n and AI-assisted structured ingestion into the SafePassage Obsidian vault.

source.description: Where the input came from, such as manual_entry, email, chat, call_note, or webhook.

received_at.description: Timestamp when n8n received the input.

classification.description: Document type selected by the intent classifier.

priority.description: Operational priority selected by the classifier or human reviewer.

target_folder.description: Vault folder selected by the document router.

normalized_markdown.description: Metadata-complete Markdown content ready to write into the vault.

processing_stages.name: webhook_receive
processing_stages.output: canonical payload with input_text, source, community, and received_at

processing_stages.name: intent_classification
processing_stages.output: classification, priority, confidence, short_summary, missing_fields, risk_signals

processing_stages.name: vault_write
processing_stages.output: Markdown file written to target folder unless blocked for human review

validation_rules: received_at must be present before classification
classification must be one supported document type or unknown
unknown classifications must route to vault/00_Inbox
normalized_markdown must include required YAML frontmatter before vault write
high or critical QA risk must require human review
secrets must not be written to vault files
phase_boundaries: No advanced automations beyond documented n8n-ready ingestion flow
